note: v2 3-layer model: pre-upload text features → post-upload YouTube metrics → log10(views). All weights are measured Pearson r values across the 372-video training corpus.

post_nodes.label: Swipe-Away Rate
post_nodes.description: Fraction of viewers who swipe away in the first second. Lower = better. Source: YouTube analytics swiped_away_rate_pct.
post_nodes.improve_hint: To lower this: open with a bold visible promise (an action_verb @1s, a sensory hook, a clear stake) — make staying easier than leaving.

post_nodes.label: End Recovery Score
post_nodes.description: Mean retention from 80–95% of the video. Captures whether viewers "stick the landing".
post_nodes.improve_hint: To raise this: tease the payoff in the hook (open_loop @1s, contrast @3s) so viewers stay for the resolution.

post_nodes.label: Retention Q4/Q1 Ratio
post_nodes.description: Mean retention in last quarter divided by first quarter. >1 = curve rising, <1 = curve falling.
post_nodes.improve_hint: To raise this: make the back half pay off — pivot_word @5s + repeated_phrase callbacks set up a satisfying return.

post_nodes.label: Final-Quarter Retention
post_nodes.description: Mean retention across the final quarter of the video (0.75–1.0).
post_nodes.improve_hint: To raise this: promise the climax in the hook so viewers wait for it. Beat_count @5s helps signal narrative arc.

post_nodes.label: Hook Drop Rate
post_nodes.description: Retention slope across the first 20% of the video (negative = dropping fast). Less negative = better hook.
post_nodes.improve_hint: To make this less negative: front-load action_verb + sensory + proof_of_work in the @1s/@3s windows.

post_nodes.label: Avg % Viewed
post_nodes.description: Average percentage of the video each viewer watched.
post_nodes.improve_hint: To raise this: longer hook setup (transcript_word_count @5s, beat_count @3s) keeps viewers committed.
